code-runner.executorMap.cpp: cd $dir && cmake -S . -B build -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release && cmake --build build --config Release --parallel && if [[ -x build/LinuxLabX.app/Contents/MacOS/LinuxLabX ]]; then build/LinuxLabX.app/Contents/MacOS/LinuxLabX; elif [[ -x build/LinuxLabX ]]; then build/LinuxLabX; elif [[ -x build/Release/LinuxLabX.exe ]]; then build/Release/LinuxLabX.exe; elif [[ -x build/LinuxLabX.exe ]]; then build/LinuxLabX.exe; else echo 'LinuxLabX executable not found'; fi
